description: The IsPlayingDriver component checks if a particular SyncPlayback is currently playing, and drives a set of Bool to reflect this status.

fields.Playback: The playback to check if it is playing
fields.Targets: The set of booleans to drive to whether or not ``Playback`` is playing or not.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a value for ``Playback`` then any boolean in the list of ``Targets`` will drive to whether or not ``Playback`` is currently playing.
